sous_titres.text: A young American on an evangelical mission,
his adventures taking a harrowing turn.
It's a journey that ended in tragedy.
American John Allen Chau was killed--
...killed after traveling to an off-limits remote tribe in the Bay of Bengal.
He wanted to share the love of God...
No one asked this kid to go North Sentinel Island...
...Chau never should've ventured out to the island.
Just trying to spread his faith.
Called him a martyr tonight, the founder saying...
He wasn't a martyr, he was an idiot.
This is what God had called him to do.
John Chau is yet another example of the evil influence of neocolonialism.
Put his money where his mouth...
What did you expect to happen?
"For God so loved the world, he gave his one and only son,
that whoever believes in him shall not perish but shall have ever--"
New Delhi wants us to test backup power.
Relax! Don't worry. Just a small test.
What is wrong with this? Just a spark, not fire.
This is Inspector Ganali, Port Blair police, Andaman Islands.
You have an alert on a missing citizen.
Has anyone else contacted you yet?
- Get back to work. - No, you'd be the first.
We got a tip he might be headed to North Sentinel Island.
No. We have no John Chau staying here.
Perhaps he's staying at another hotel.
This man does not want attention.
Other hotels require credit cards and passports, not yours.
This is how he looks like.
Ma'am, as you can see, there are so many people
pass through here on a daily basis.
Then we'll go room by room until we find him.
He had me call a taxi for him.
Did he say where he was going?
He should be in charge. Not you.
I'm looking for an American male. Last name is "Chau". C-H-A-U.
First name is John or Jonathan.
Nothing here. Not booked on anything going out today.
Just show me all the Americans traveling today.
Take your bag and come with me, please.
And your reason for coming here?
Just stopping off for a few days before heading to Thailand.
You only arrived this morning. You're flying out again?
Yeah, it's just a change of plans.
I had to get to Thailand sooner than I thought.
Mm-hmm. I'm currently based there, yeah.
Going to North Sentinel Island is a crime.
Helping someone get there is also a crime.
What's that got to do with me?
On the eve of our graduation,
as we prepare to go out and make our mark in the world,
we remember what Jesus himself said,
in sending his own disciples out into the world,
"Go where my light is dim, and my voice is small."
Would all of you reach down underneath your seats
and take out what you find there.
This next part is entirely optional.
If you're ready to say yes,
to commit to illuminating the darkest corners
If you pledge with me to hear the cries of the damned
as they hurtle headlong into the Christless night...
Why didn't you just light the candle?
What are you trying to prove?
Hi, sweetheart. Hi. Oh, so great to see you.
Guys, thank you so much for coming all the way out here.
For the family gathered here on John's graduation.
May you continue guiding him on his journey.
Well, what time is it? Are they still open?
To write your own adventure novel with.
It's gonna need some more pages.
This one... is from your father.
I never had one that nice.
Still cannot believe you flew out.
Mom, I wanna let you know, I'm not coming back.
I'm not coming back home after school ends.
There's a missionary program that helps organize support for refugee kids.
I'm not going to medical school.
-John. -You have to break it to Dad.
I don't want to be a doctor.
I'm not like Brian or Marilyn, okay? I'm not perfect like them.
When I'm out there in the wilderness,
that's when I feel closest to God.
Welcome all of you to your first day of medical school.
This is the beginning of a very long,
but ultimately, very rewarding career as a doctor,
one of the most vital and important roles in society.
Have you studied cadaver work yet?
It takes a bit, but after your residency, you'll see.
Being a doctor will open up the world for you.
I'm sure the Lord will reveal John's path when the time is right.
Your father just wants the best for you.
They're saying he illegally prescribed painkillers to undercover agents.
I think they might file criminal charges.
Where do we keep those little things of toothpaste?
I never should've have doubted Him, Mom.
Is this the two of you together?
I came out here to stop him.
Well, he hid it from everybody.
As soon as I realized what he was doing, I rushed out here.
That's exactly what you people do, push your beliefs on others.
No, I did not want John to get hurt.
Oh, so you talked him out of it?
I couldn't find him. I went to his hotel--
I went to his hotel. He's not there. He's not answering his phone!
I didn't know what else to do, so I came back to the airport.
Believe me, I can do much worse than that. Now, come with me.
Okay, look, let's just calm down. Will you just sit back down--
Come on, come on. It's yours! Take it, take it.
"I revealed myself to those who did not ask for me.
I was found by those who did not seek me.
To a nation that did not call my name, I said, 'Here am I, here am I.'"
Hold on tight to me, okay?
This is a bit of an off-books operation.
If you ask me, what's the point of saving somebody's body but not their soul?
Sometimes you gotta just jump in, ready or not.
No one's ever got that before.
Imagine what it sounds like there.
You want to take a ride?
It's in case we crash, they can find your body.
We're currently flying over ancient Mesopotamia,
headwaters of the Tigris and Euphrates river.
You know what Genesis 2:14 calls that place?
We've got the God's-eye view of it.
Hey, you wanna fly her a bit?
You wanna fly her a bit?
There you go. Keep her steady.
Should be right over the drop zone.
There's two kinds of missionaries in this world, John.
One's all those NGO bureaucrats on the ground down there,
sealed off in their compounds, handing out...
Well, God doesn't make many of them, that's for sure.
Show me where else you've been.
You've been to all these places?
Christian missionaries aren't allowed to go to those areas.
Not gonna find those stamps in our passports.
Let me ask you something. This day and age,
You know, what kind of risks are you willing to take?
How far behind enemy lines are you willing to go?
What the hell is this thing?
He's immensely strong. The real deal. Just look at him.
This is a crowd-control dog. I asked for a drug-sniffing dog.
It's a she. It's a female.
What shall we name it, sir?
It's not getting a name. It's going back to where it came from.
Look at that. He doesn't like her.
I spoke to the US Consulate, sir. And I--
how many islands have we jurisdiction over?
And this John Chau of yours, he could have gone to any one of them.
Of the top ten uncontacted tribes targeted by the missionaries
for conversion to Christianity, one is right here on North Sentinel.
I can't believe we made the top ten list.
go to the North Sentinelese and tell them of their good fortune.
Sir, he may still be here in Port Blair. He may be waiting to leave at night.
And when he does, he'll be intercepted by the coast guard,
which has a very tight blockade around North Sentinel.
But it's much more likely he's just another tourist,
here to drink, cavort, and lie on the beach.
May I at least alert the navy and coast guard
to be on the lookout for someone attempting to reach the island?
If we issued an alert every time some American brat
forgets to call home, we'd never rest.
For the love of God, remove this canine from my office.
This fellow, as you call him, has been casing the wharf
for a boat crew to take him to North Sentinel.
And how do you know that?
Sir, we found the crew. Main pier on the east side.
What is this? What are you hiding?
Harbor surveillance cameras show this boat departing Friday at midnight,
running lights off, and returning at sunrise.
So they confessed to taking John Chau to North Sentinel?
Oh, they will. Once they've seen the inside of a jail cell.
The lights barely work on this rust bucket.
After four months, you still don't know where you are, sub-inspector.
This is Port Blair. This is the edge of the world.
Policing is not about technology or interrogation tactics.
Can you even speak their language?
They indeed took John Chau out on their boat.
See? What did I tell you?
And then they brought him back to Port Blair.
He has returned to Port Blair having most likely learned his lesson.
How do you know they brought him back?
They could be lying to avoid getting in trouble.
They are already in trouble, miss.
Then where is he? He came back here, got off the boat. Then what?
Like I said, sub-inspector, check the bars, check the beaches,
It's there you'll find your missing John Chau.
He believes God sent him here to save the souls of the Sentinelese.
Young people believe all kinds of things.
Release him from custody and put him on the next plane out.
Sir, there's more going on here. I know it.
Here's what I think is going on.
An ambitious lady cop takes a position
in a shithole post out in the middle of nowhere.
Hoping to make a name for herself, she seizes on the dumb actions
save the islanders from this pernicious influence.
And then be rewarded with a big promotion.
All the while neglecting her husband on the mainland.
Do I have that about right, sub-inspector?
Hey, next year, I plan our trip.
It's been five years in a row of hostels and crappy food.
Hey, John. You got our map, right?
This whole trip you seem a little down.
I'm just trying to figure out some stuff.
Dude, you're the most figured out person we know.
- I'm just trying to, you know, find my path.
- You're gonna live out our dreams. Yeah!
Don't do that. Don't put that on me.
When we first started on these trips,
it was about helping people see God.
Is this as far as we're willing to go?
What the guys mean is, um...
Look, Katie and I are trying to have kids.
And Zach is taking over his dad's business.
And Dylan is moving to LA to be the next Tom Cruise!
All right. Well, I guess that...
Where do you wanna go, John?
The Great Commission was given to us by the Resurrected Christ,
who said, "Go and make disciples of all nations."
This is a satellite video of the highlands of Papua New Guinea,
These people have never been told about our Savior Jesus Christ,
but one day, one of you...
But that doesn't mean things won't go wrong, because they will.
if you get injured, and there's no hospital?
How will you persevere if you're lost and need to scavenge for food?
What will you do if you get stranded in an active war zone
- If you plan to travel... - Bye, y'all!
We can camp here for the night. Let's go.
Our Father, who art in heaven, Hallowed be Thy name.
I sold it to pay for the lawyer.
...I didn't know they were federal agents.
I'm trained to help those in need.
He's got a plan for you. I promise.
I came to this country with nothing.
it was a way to belong, meet nice people.
Try to live the right way.
Your mother and I have always supported you
You-You don't have to be a doctor.
But I want you to come home with me.
You're tired. You've been driving all night.
Come on, let me get you a coffee.
You've always been a dreamer, John.
But... it is time to wake up.
You used to dream, too, Dad.
Coming up in the sky past the ship.
Like if I could get beyond that frame, it would take me to another world.
You shouldn't have stopped painting, Dad.
For the Kingdom of God. God..."
Oh, God, please keep my plans hidden from the forces of darkness."
Don't get many visitors out here.
And, yes, I lead trips on the side. Diving and snorkeling.
Ever taken anyone to North Sentinel Island?
What do you know about people who live there?
Different island, different language, different everything.
So you can't communicate with them?
No one can. They don't want to talk to us.
Oh, no. My husband bakes them.
How many mobile phones do you own?
I've seen at least three since I walked in here.
So either I'm a good businessman or a gangster.
And what sort of business did you have with John Chau?
Your address was in his notebook. Stop wasting my time.
He asked for my assistance, and I refused.
Do you know what they'd do, the North Sentinelese,
if he was to set foot on their island?
They'd crush his skull to free the spirit.
Then mount his body on a stake, right on the beach.
This guy's really gotten under your skin, hasn't he?
Since when did the police do that?
It's a bar. Near the Aberdeen bus terminus.
It's there if you look for it.
It's nice, man. You look good, you been working out?
- Yeah. Yeah. A little bit. - Yeah?
Well, they're burning the rainforest down.
You know, all this trash is coming downstream from the bigger towns.
Married a Presbyterian minister. Drives a Tesla.
Most people give it up sooner than later.
So, um, you remember that map on the wall?
Yeah, I'm thinking about going somewhere.
Are you sure I need to know?
North Sentinel is the Mount Everest of the missionary world.
I'm not-- I'm not thinking small. I'm going big.
I came all the way out here to talk to you.
Do you have any idea how much I prepped for this?
Listen to me. This isn't the old days.
This stuff, it's harder than ever.
Indian government has gotten really good at spotting fanatics.
By spending 30 seconds on your Instagram.
There's Christian messaging all the way through it.
Not to mention they'll see where you went to school.
You know, the places you trained, the organizations you worked for.
They're not gonna hand you a visa.
They're gonna put your ass on the next plane home.
I've just finished my EMT qualifications.
I'm going to go get all the inoculations.
I found a contact in Jaipur who knows a guy in Port Blair.
Look, you can start by scrubbing Jesus from your social media.
All right? You take six months, nine months.
Stop bragging about what you're going to do.
But you gotta build him the right way, so the world believes it.
You know, you start over. You build a hero.
All right, from today on, this is the story
you're going to tell about yourself.
And this will be the story the world will know.
Wish you were here. Can't wait to show you my adventures.
Just remember, if it's not you, then who?
Jim and Denise are coming over.
He's exhausted. He shaved and went straight up to his room.
I see black bear, mama with cubs, 400 pounds.
I'm bushwhacking along the trail, and I just hear the...
This diamondback rears up its head and just...
-...jabs me in the shin! -I can't even imagine!
John, you have to swing to church and share your tales.
They're starting to think that I'm making it up when I tell them.
So how long you back for?
Uh, I'm headed off again tomorrow.
Oh, that's not much time home.
Yeah, well, it's long enough for Mom's cooking.
Well, I was hiking along a different trail this time...
Do you have any sunscreen I can take?
Come here one minute. Let me see.
Ah, no, I need more. Thank you.
I've had those on my wrist since I was ten years old.
And you weren't ten, you were seven.
You know those are Buddhist beads, right?
I just want you to be closer to your heritage, you know?
- I'm still here. - The beads are still here.
- You flip but they flop. - Now your pancakes are a mess.
And all that butter and fat to cook 'em?
There's got to be a better way!
What is your purpose to visit India?
Ladies and gentlemen, Flight 104 from Jaipur to Mumbai...
Where do you intend to go?
What the hell is wrong with you people?
How long has this John... whatever-his-name-is been missing?
Ah. I give you a monkey's job.
Now the American Embassy is calling about this kid.
The media is calling about this kid.
The Lieutenant Governor in Delhi knows about this kid!
I've been treating this as a top priority, huh?
They're a UNESCO designated indigenous tribe.
You've got warships, attack helicopters, coast guard.
What the hell else do you need?
I've been studying this boy's journal.
He may still be here in Port Blair.
He may be waiting to leave at night.
Sir. Sir, I told you he checked out.
There's nothing in here, sir. Sir!
Then find out where he went,
who he talked to, what he was last wearing.
I want everything you have on this guy.
Don't just sit there looking stupid!
Go and arrest those fishermen. Fill up the jail.
Pretend like you actually have a job to do!
Maybe if you'd tried being nicer to the witnesses, they'd cooperate.
Never knew you had a sense of humor.
If I may, should we not get back to solving the case?
What you're doing is theater. And you know it.
There's a local fixer. His name is Raz. Do you know him?
If John Chau went to anybody for help, it's this fellow.
North Sentinel's barely 30 miles from here.
If it's so easy, get a kayak.
Good luck with the currents. Good luck with the coast guards.
What is it with you guys?
Ah? You travel halfway across the world
because you think it's your job to save people.
What if we came to America and did that to you?
You walk away, you're sending these people to hell.
Missionaries tried to save my people.
You think this hardcore Christian shit is going to make people accept you?
No matter what you do, you will always be a Chink to them.
Hey. Bring this to the wharf tonight.
There's a crew who go out fishing at night.
They'll get me all the way over there for 300?
Not all the way. Not to the beach. That's crazy.
From there you go the rest of the way alone.
Ishaan, suspect's heading north your way.
Farid, there is a river west to Ishaan's road.
Madam, we cleared both the road and river from suspect's house to here.
The only other place is the shrimping dock on the other side.
Ishaan, cover the southeast side of the shipping dock.
Call coast guard. It's a red speedboat. It's heading out to sea.
Sir, it's him. It's a red speedboat.
You saw him? You saw it was John Chau?
The boat was hiding there, sir.
Then you did not make a positive identification.
It's pitch dark out there. Who else could it be?
Smugglers use these coves dropping off refugees from Bangladesh.
Sir, John Chau is getting away.
are routinely victimized by crime here in Port Blair.
And you've become obsessed with this one stupid American boy?
I don't care about the American boy.
It's the Sentinelese I care for.
All they want is to be who they are.
Yet the world is determined to go there and destroy them.
You were given a monkey's job.
This is my jurisdiction, not yours.
You had no authorization to deploy my officers out here.
Now go back to the station and turn in your badge.
All this hot air from you, and only one thing you've said is true.
Hey. Hey! Here. Take a seat.
Guys! Grab it. Grab my drink.
- You're getting soaked. - Oh, my God!
Every day it rains at 2:00 p.m., like clockwork.
By 2:15, it'll be sunny again. I love it.
It's been ten long days with this lot.
Looks like you've had yourself quite the morning.
Don't tell me it's fallen through.
It didn't say anything about whether it was a manual or an auto.
- What do you reckon? - None of us.
Thanks for doing this, mate. You're a real godsend.
You sure we're not taking you away from anything?
Just a little bit further. Come on.
Yeah. But how do we get down there?
Well, it was nice knowing him.
And tomorrow, it's just... on to the next amusement.
I ask you a question, then you ask me one.
Who taught you to stick shift?
What do you wanna do with your life?
How come you've got epinephrine in your backpack?
Why did you follow me off the waterfall?
Have you got a favorite scar?
Is one of those guys your boyfriend?
Have you seen the ice machine in my hotel?
I don't mean to rush, but they could be back any minute now.
It's like a hundred degrees in here. Are you...
Do you... do you not want to do this?
It's everyone's first time at some point, right?
A kid shot me this morning.
He shot me with an arrow.
It was right when I thought I was getting through to them.
The North Sentinelese. I was there. This morning.
No sense in lying. It feels so good to tell you.
Can I please have some privacy for once?
John, what are you talking about?
Why were you on that island?
These people don't know about Jesus Christ.
And you came here to convert them.
I sensed there was something different about you.
But never would have guessed this one.
Have you ever heard the term "human safari"?
Yes, yes, of course I have.
I love the North Sentinelese. I wouldn't hurt them.
Do you know what Western imperialism has done to this part of the world?
Almost every tribe has gone extinct after contact with the West.
I've taken the precautions. I'm inoculated.
And whoever did survive, whoever wasn't wiped out by disease--
Look at me! Am I some scary guy?
But how can you not see the problem with what you're doing?
I mean, you say you love the North Sentinelese.
You don't know the first thing about them.
They're living in darkness. They are lost.
What are you trying to prove?
Just another day in paradise here.
What you are doing is disgusting.
Inspector Ganali, this is Steve Simon, US Consulate.
What do you think I've been doing all this time?
Yeah, that's what people seem to think.
Any chance you guys can get his body back?
Or... is that a whole thing?
Do you know what is even better than his body?
Let me try and read it out to you.
"God, I thank you for choosing me
even before I was even formed in my mother's womb
as your messenger of the Good News to the people of North Sentinel Island."
"God, I do not wish to die. Who will take my place if I do?"
He does not know the tribe! He doesn't know anything!
This is Inspector Ganali, Port Blair Police.
I'm requesting for a search and rescue helicopter
to take me to North Sentinel at first light.
I've never met anybody like you before.
So yesterday, when I got shot...
So, like, it literally stopped the arrow.
So, last night I opened it up.
You know, I wanted to see where the arrow stopped.
"I revealed myself to those who did not ask for me.
I was found by those who did not seek me."
I was thinking, like, how incredible is that?
The arrow would stop the missionary's creed.
It's gotta be a sign, right? And then I realized something, okay?
I realized it wasn't the North Sentinelese I revealed myself to.
You were right. I don't need to go back to that island.
After you left, I was worried.
Uh, what did you say to them?
I didn't know what else to do, John.
Now. Soon. We're headed to the airport.
I came to see you. Remember?
Hey, don't tell me you're leaving already.
Dude, I need to hear about everything.
Forget about her. There's plenty of chicks out there who dig Christian guys.
You actually made it to the island. You preached in the waves, man.
You can go home without shame.
Home to what? What am I supposed to do now?
Like I said, this kind of thing isn't for most people, okay?
When Jesus asked those fishermen in the Sea of Galilee to follow him,
how many guys do you think he had to go to before he found 12 that said yes?
Is that supposed to make me feel better?
Yes! Yes, of course it's supposed to make you feel better.
And the demands that Christ makes on us, they're unreasonable.
There's a plane leaving for Bangkok in 45 minutes. Get on it.
What do you mean? I just got here.
The police know about me. Soon they'll know about you.
Three hundred should be enough to find a boat.
You seriously thinking of going back?
There's a flight just right now.
...it's coming out of her mouth and mine.
About to be dropped off for good on North Sentinel.
I hope this isn't the last you hear from me.
We let him get farther and farther away.
God only knows where he is now.
We've known for years what John was going to do.
And now that he's there, he needs our prayers.
Because if anyone can pull this off, it's our son.
We're holding a prayer group for John.
You're not a police officer anymore.
I could have you jailed for this.
Are you going to ignore me like you ignore your husband?
It was a stupid story I made up for you people!
The one I love refuses to marry me because her religion,
our religion, won't permit her to become my wife.
Now do you understand you stupid son of a bitch?
There's no word in Hindi for who I am.
John Chau had no place in this world either.
That's what people do when they're lost.
If the police say a man is dead, that man will be dead.
If the poilce say a man is merely missing,
his relatives and friends may live in hope.
